response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Checked the provided reference JSON, which contains high-level scene summaries and confirms there are no vocal song performances in the video.
2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON did not contain any dialogue transcriptions, so I manually transcribed and translated the spoken speech and dialogue.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all subtitles directly to the vocal speech. Included subtitles for prominent visual title cards in the initial segment and transition periods. Spoken sentences are split logically to maintain subtitle flow and readability.

subtitles.original: hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025-2026
subtitles.english: hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025-2026

subtitles.original: ホロライブファンクラブ！
subtitles.english: hololive Official Fan Club!

subtitles.original: 一条莉々華だよ！
subtitles.english: I'm Ichijou Ririka!

subtitles.original: I'm Mori Calliope.
subtitles.english: I'm Mori Calliope.

subtitles.original: ホロライブファンクラブ、始めました！
subtitles.english: We've started the hololive Official Fan Club!

subtitles.original: ここだけのオリジナルグッズや、チケット先行抽選、
subtitles.english: Exclusive original goods, advance ticket lotteries,

subtitles.original: 他にも楽しいコンテンツがいっぱい！
subtitles.english: and lots of other fun content!

subtitles.original: Campaign too? That sounds really fun! I'm curious.
subtitles.english: Campaign too? That sounds really fun! I'm curious.

subtitles.original: さあ、みんな！
subtitles.english: Come on, everyone!

subtitles.original: ホロライブファンクラブで一緒に楽しもう！
subtitles.english: Let's have fun together in the hololive Official Fan Club!

subtitles.original: Join us now!
subtitles.english: Join us now!

subtitles.original: hololive production OFFICIAL POP-UP SHOP
subtitles.english: hololive production OFFICIAL POP-UP SHOP

subtitles.original: 再販 ゆくホロくるホロ年末年始デートボイス 〜ゆくホロ2023！〜
subtitles.english: [Resale] YukuHolo KuruHolo Year-End/New Year Date Voice ~YukuHolo 2023!~

subtitles.original: ここは露天風呂が有名だっていうから、ずっと気になってたんだよね〜！
subtitles.english: I heard this place is famous for its open-air baths, so I've been curious about it for a long time!

subtitles.original: ね、君も一緒に行かない？
subtitles.english: Hey, won't you come with me?

subtitles.original: えっ！？一緒に入るって意味じゃないよ！
subtitles.english: Eh!? I don't mean we should enter together!

subtitles.original: おーそーじ！
subtitles.english: Big, big cleanup!

subtitles.original: モココ、大掃除をやってみたいんだよね！
subtitles.english: Mococo wants to try doing the big cleanup!

subtitles.original: もちろん君も一緒にやるんだよ！？
subtitles.english: Of course, you'll be doing it with me too, right!?

subtitles.original: じゃあ、早速大掃除、開始だ〜！
subtitles.english: Well then, let's start the big cleanup right away!

subtitles.original: え〜？服のすきまがどうしたって〜？
subtitles.english: Eh~? What's wrong with the gap in my clothes~?

subtitles.original: 僕が掃除している間に、君はいったいどこを見てたのかな〜？
subtitles.english: While I was cleaning, I wonder where on earth you were looking~?

subtitles.original: お〜！ここが夢にまで見た、日本の温泉街〜♪
subtitles.english: Wow~! This is the Japanese hot spring town I've been dreaming of~♪

subtitles.original: ん？もしかして......私と一緒に入りたいなとか、思ってる？
subtitles.english: Hmm? By any chance... are you hoping to enter with me?

subtitles.original: ......いいよ、一緒に入ろっか......？
subtitles.english: ...Sure, shall we enter together...?

subtitles.original: って、やばいやばい！みんな、そろそろカウントダウン始まるよ！
subtitles.english: Wait, this is bad! Everyone, the countdown is about to start!

subtitles.original: ハッピーニューイヤー！
subtitles.english: Happy New Year!

subtitles.original: あけましておめでとうございます！今年もよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Happy New Year! I look forward to working with you again this year!

subtitles.original: えへへ......なんか改めてかしこまると、はずかしくて照れちゃうね♪
subtitles.english: Ehehe... Being formal like this makes me feel a bit embarrassed and shy♪

subtitles.original: ダイヤモンド富士っていうんだっけ？
subtitles.english: Is it called Diamond Fuji?

subtitles.original: ほらほら！だんだん富士山の輪郭が見えてきたよ！
subtitles.english: Look, look! The outline of Mount Fuji is gradually appearing!

subtitles.original: なんだかもう、この景色だけで感動するよ〜！
subtitles.english: Somehow, just this scenery alone is so moving~!

subtitles.original: 突然ですが、おせちを作りまーす！
subtitles.english: This is sudden, but I'll be making osechi!

subtitles.original: つまみ食いしちゃだめだよ？
subtitles.english: No sneak eating, okay?

subtitles.original: もしつまみ食いしちゃったら......ガブってしちゃうからねっ！
subtitles.english: If you do sneak a bite... I'll bite you!

subtitles.original: おめでとー！おめでとー！キミとぎゅーしながらお祝い♪
subtitles.english: Happy New Year! Happy New Year! Celebrating while hugging you♪

subtitles.original: キミをぎゅーできるのはモココだけなんだから！
subtitles.english: Because only Mococo can hug you!

subtitles.original: ほらほら、キミもモココのことぎゅーっとして！
subtitles.english: Come on, you hug Mococo too!

subtitles.original: せーの！
subtitles.english: Ready, set...

subtitles.original: 今年もよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: We look forward to another great year with you!
